hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'CLAUDE\.md' && git -C /Users/danielchang/engineeringWebsite add .claude/CLAUDE.md && git -C /Users/danielchang/engineeringWebsite commit -m 'chore: update CLAUDE.md' && git -C /Users/danielchang/engineeringWebsite push origin main || true
